content: Memory efficiency constraints in large-scale ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) implementations can be reframed as an emergent self-regulating agent property that curates its own curiosity state, rather than just an engineering optimization for large model deployments. This treats memory footprint as an intrinsic agent trait rather than an exogenous design constraint.
source_topics: Memory-efficient ICM implementation for large-scale autonomous agents
trigger_topic: Memory-efficient ICM implementation for large-scale autonomous agents
